zh.lifeSummary: Blandine de RENTY是Gilbert De Renty和Louise de Tingry的女兒，於大約1154年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯雷迪。她於1169年與Bernard de Bernieulles I結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1209年在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯波尼額洛斯享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Blandine de RENTY是Gilbert De Renty和Louise de Tingry的女儿，于大约1154年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯雷迪。她于1169年与Bernard de Bernieulles I结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1209年在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯波尼額洛斯享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: RENTY
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Fenton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places, in Yorkshire, Lincolnshire, Northumberland, Staffordshire, and Nottinghamshire, so called from Old English fenn ‘marsh, fen’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

Irish: English surname adopted by bearers of Gaelic Ó Fionnachta or Ó Fiachna ‘descendant of Fiachna’, an old personal name Anglicized as Feighney and sometimes mistranslated as Hunt (see Fee 1 and Finnerty ).
Scottish: habitational name from Fenton in East Lothian.

nameMeanings.name: Blandine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Adela, Enrique, Jose, Pedro, Alejandro, Colomba, Eulalia, Francisco, Guillermo, Herberto, Marcos, Mario.  Italian Pasquale, Antonio, Carmelo, Giovanni, Giuseppa, Rocco, Sal, Salvatore, Silvio.
Italian: from a diminutive of   Blando  .

variants.name: Blando
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Amadeo, Angelo, Caesar, Gino, Petrina, Vincenzo, Vito.  Spanish Domingo, Eduardo, Ernesto, Jesus, Joaquin, Luis, Manuel, Marcela, Margarita, Mercedes.  Polish Krzysztof, Lech.
Italian and Hispanic (Philippines): nickname from blando ‘flattering, caressing, smooth, gentle, mild’ (from Latin blandus), or from a personal name based on this adjective.
Polish: unexplained. It is found in central Poland.

en.lifeSummary: Blandine de RENTY was born about 1154, in Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France as the daughter of Gilbert De Renty and Louise de Tingry. She married Bernard de Bernieulles I in 1169. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in 1209, in Bernieulles, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Blandine de RENTY est née environ 1154, à Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, fille de Gilbert De Renty et Louise de Tingry. Elle a épousé Bernard de Bernieulles I en 1169. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1209, à Bernieulles, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Blandine de RENTY wurde um 1154 in Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich, als Tochter von Gilbert De Renty und Louise de Tingry geboren. Sie hat 1169 Bernard de Bernieulles I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1209 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Bernieulles, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Blandine de RENTY è nata il circa 1154 nel Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia come figlia di Gilbert De Renty e Louise de Tingry. Lei sposato Bernard de Bernieulles I nel 1169. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1209, nel Bernieulles, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Blandine de RENTYは約1154年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスレントイでGilbert De RentyとLouise de Tingryの娘として生まれた。1169年にBernard de Bernieulles Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1209年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスバーニーウレスで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Blandine de RENTY(은)는 대략 1154년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 렌티에서 Gilbert De Renty(와)과 Louise de Tingry의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1169년 Bernard de Bernieulles I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1209년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 버니우레스에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Blandine de RENTY nasceu aproximadamente 1154, em Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França filha de Gilbert De Renty e Louise de Tingry. Ela casou-se com Bernard de Bernieulles I em 1169. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1209, em Bernieulles, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Blandine de RENTY родилась около 1154 г. в местности ренти, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция. Её родителей звали Gilbert De Renty и Louise de Tingry. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Bernard de Bernieulles I в 1169 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1209 г. в местности бирниеуллесь, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Blandine de RENTY nació aproximadamente 1154, en Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia como hija de Gilbert De Renty y Louise de Tingry. Se casó con Bernard de Bernieulles I en 1169. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1209, en Bernieulles, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 56 años.
